---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Edward Harold Browne"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Edward Harold Browne

**Dates:** (1811-1891)

### Description

Bishop of Winchester

### Biography

He married (1840) Elizabeth Carlyon.  He became Bishop of Ely in 1864 then succeeded Samuel Wilberforce as Bishop of Winchester in 1873, resigning the see in 1890.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 22 [1893][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Aug 17th 1893
- Letter from Novr 4th [1886]
- Letter from April10 th [1883]
- Letter from March 26th 1882
- Letter from [check 1872]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
